visualizations.title: Alignment & Comparison Test
visualizations.description: Lining up place values and padding with trailing zeros to compare values.

steps.explanation: Pad with a trailing zero so it has three decimal places, matching 0.709.
Compare Tenths: Both have 7, so move to the next digit.
Compare Hundredths: 2 is greater than 0. The comparison is decided!

visualizations.title: Visual Comparison of 0.4 and 0.35
visualizations.description: Watch how padding 0.4 to 0.40 visually matches 40/100 against 35/100, showing that 0.4 is larger.
